name: FarmBlock Distress Index (FDI)

dim_health_prox.label: Health burden proxy (poverty)
dim_health_prox.note: CDC PLACES not available this run; poverty used as validated proxy

normalization: min-max 0-1 per dimension across all queried tracts
missing_data_policy: median imputation if <5% missing per variable; all rates <2.5% this run
limitations: Census ACS 2023 5-year rolling estimates — not point-in-time

CDC PLACES 2023 — health data is DIRECT in Phase 2 county formula (not proxied). Phase 1 tract run used poverty proxy; Phase 2 corrected. See farmblock_fdi_phase2.json for confirmed Phase 2 health values.
Equal weighting is an explicit assumption; sensitivity analysis with alternate weights recommended
FDI measures correlation of structural conditions, not causation
Analysis limited to 53 counties; national expansion (Option C) is Phase 2
reproducibility: All code CC0. Run: python3 farmblock_pipeline_v2.py with CENSUS_API_KEY env var set.
health_note: Phase 2 (county level): CDC PLACES 2023 direct values used for diabetes_pct and hypertension_pct. Health proxy was Phase 1 only.
